executive_summary: The converging pressures on global supply chains and fuel reserves, coupled with wealth inequality, present a significant elevated threat. The Middle East energy spike could exacerbate the situation. Taiwan media activity is an outlying factor and requires monitoring.
correlations: Supply Chain Stress and Global Fuel Reserves are linked: reduced fuel amplifies existing supply chain fragility. Wealth Inequality Fracture Gap and Supply Chain Stress are linked as higher stress exacerbates the wealth divide.
